site: Utah FORGE (Milford / Roosevelt Hot Springs, Utah, USA)

datasets.description: Complete Bouguer gravity anomaly stations over Utah FORGE (UGS + PACES compilation).
68 transient-electromagnetic (TEM) soundings (USF format) at Utah FORGE.

113 magnetotelluric sites (EDI impedance tensors) over the FORGE + Roosevelt Hot Springs footprint, coordinate-filtered from the SW-Utah survey; plus the FORGE 3-D inverted resistivity model and per-site soundings.
Deep well 16A(78)-32 log suite: spectral gamma (LAS), Schlumberger logs, Sanvean logs, cement-bond log, dipole-anisotropy results, and a mud log with temperature.
Deep well 58-32 (MU-ESW1) log suite: DSI dipole sonic (Vp/Vs, LAS), Schlumberger logs (FMI, array induction), end-of-well report, and pressure/temperature logs.
Pressure/temperature logs (LAS + PDF) — bottom-hole temperature and the geothermal gradient for the FORGE deep wells.
InSAR ground-deformation 2019: mean rate of line-of-sight range change and standard errors (CSV + NetCDF).
Helper script to download the continuous geophone/DAS waveforms from well 78-32 (data hosted at the University of Utah CHPC; tens of GB).

not_included.magnetics: No dedicated open FORGE aeromagnetic product found; the synthetic generator provides magnetics.
not_included.seismic_reflection: No open active-source 3-D seismic cube; synthetic generator provides seismic.
not_included.microseismic_waveforms: Continuous waveforms are tens of GB off-site (use the helper script).
